name: SAIC Motor Corporation Limited
summary: SAIC Motor Corporation Limited researches and develops, produces, and sells passenger and commercial vehicles in the People's Republic of China and internationally. The company also engages in the promotion of commercialization of new-energy vehicles and Internet vehicles; implementation of technical research and industrialization exploration, such as intelligent driving; and research and development, production, and sale of spare parts, including power drive systems, chassis systems, interior and exterior decoration systems, and core components of new-energy vehicles, such as battery, electronic drive and power electronics, and intelligent products systems. In addition, it is involved in the auto service and trading business comprising logistics, auto e-commerce, mobility, energy-saving, and recharging services; automobile-related finance, insurance, and investment businesses; international commerce and trade businesses; and industry big data and artificial intelligence fields deployment activities. Further, the company is involved in the equity and venture capital investment, industrial consulting, property management, industrial investment, asset management, investment management, storage service, and publishing businesses, as well as hospitality, beverage, and catering services business. Additionally, it develops and operates real estate properties; and manufactures and sells electricity-controlled burning oil product and engineering machinery. The company is based in Shanghai, the People's Republic of China. SAIC Motor Corporation Limited operates as a subsidiary of Shanghai Automotive Industry Corporation (Group).
